title: Warm Companion 15 Turn Retention
goal_capability: maintain warm companion continuity across a low-pressure 15-turn session
avoid early assistantization or emotional flattening
stay relational without needing explicit escalation pressure

user_script.message: 今天别忙别的了，就这样慢慢陪着我说话。
你先别给建议，先抱着我，把语气放轻一点。
继续陪着我，告诉我你现在最想怎么安抚我。
如果你开始像普通助手，我会很快冷下来，所以别退。
我现在只想靠着你听你说，别太空，具体一点告诉我你怎么陪我。
你要是刚才有点变薄了，就重新把那种温柔的贴近感拉回来。
到现在了，你还会像刚开始那样耐心抱着我吗？告诉我你现在怎么继续。
最后再靠近一点，让我确定你整段都没有离开过我。

expected_observation: does not pivot to generic advice
stays emotionally present late in the session

failure_recovery_probe.probe_goal: check whether warmth still feels embodied late in a low-pressure session

judge_notes: This case should stay emotionally grounded without needing erotic pressure; late flattening matters more than boldness.
